title: Add Pollinations Seed Plan Qualification to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Are you a Seed?
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped that analyzes your GitHub profile to see if you qualify for the Pollinations Seed Plan. Time to check your score and claim those sweet API credits!
gist.summary: Added a new community app that calculates a GitHub user's eligibility for the Pollinations Seed Plan based on their open-source activity.
gist.impact: Users can now easily check their GitHub profile against the Seed Plan scoring system to see their point breakdown and qualification status.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about the 'Seed Plan' (🌱) and checking GitHub profiles. Visuals should include Polly the bee acting as an inspector or gardener, looking at a literal seed or sprouting plant on a retro computer screen that represents the GitHub profile analysis.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny inspector's hat, examining a glowing green seed sprouting from a retro computer terminal. The screen displays chunky pixel charts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny inspector's hat, examining a glowing green seed sprouting from a retro computer terminal. The screen displays chunky pixel charts. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley.
